name: get_store_priorities
description: Returns today's store operation priorities: urgent orders (stockout risk), production blocks, waste risks, and items needing manager review.

name: get_order_recommendation
description: Returns the ordering recommendation for a specific product or all products. Includes recommended cases, forecasted demand, stockout risk, waste risk, confidence, and reason codes.

product_id.description: Product ID (e.g. P001). Omit to get all products.

name: get_production_plan
description: Returns production recommendations. Can filter by product and/or time window (e.g. '10:30-11:00'). Shows status: normal, sufficient, hold, blocked, elevated, reduced.

name: get_inventory_state
description: Returns current floor stock, backroom stock, and current_stock_estimate for a product or all products.

name: get_external_signals
description: Returns active external signals affecting store operations today: weather, promotions, local events, supply issues.

name: search_products
description: Search for products by name or department using a text query.

query.description: Text to search for in product name or department.

name: get_ingredient_availability
description: For a prepared food product, returns ingredient availability and the maximum producible quantity given current inventory and any active ingredient constraints.

product_id.description: Product ID for the prepared item (e.g. P004 for Pulled Pork Sandwich).
